rule_text: For Mexican cooking ingredients, he favors traditional fresh components over shortcut or generic substitutes.
canonical_answer: For my Mexican dishes, I prefer ordering the real fresh ingredients instead of shortcut substitutes.
counterfactual_default: Pick the most convenient or generic product option that roughly fits the recipe.

evidence.content: routinely crafts pozole with fresh hominy, pork shoulder, and a blend of guajillo and ancho chilies
every Día de los Muertos they bake pan de muerto infused with orange zest and anise

rule_text: When a kitchen gadget order disappoints him, he prefers an exchange over a refund or store credit.
canonical_answer: If a kitchen gadget misses the mark, I usually want an exchange so I can try a better version.
counterfactual_default: Request a refund as the standard resolution.

evidence.content: splurging on new kitchen gadgets
Because he actively enjoys experimenting in the kitchen and repeatedly buys gadgets, replacing a bad gadget with a better one fits his use pattern better than simply cashing out.

rule_text: When choosing a place to eat out, he prefers locally rooted Mexican or Tex-Mex restaurants over generic chains.
canonical_answer: I usually pick local Mexican or Tex-Mex spots instead of chain restaurants.
counterfactual_default: Choose a broadly popular or familiar chain restaurant.

evidence.content: The cultural landscape of the Rio Grande Valley, with its blend of Texan and Mexican influences, is reflected in his love for regional music like norteño and cumbia
He is an avid cook, experimenting with traditional Mexican dishes such as pozole, chiles en nogada, and adjusting them with Tex-Mex twists.

rule_text: For live entertainment, he tends to choose folk, regional Mexican, or singer-songwriter performances over generic event options.
canonical_answer: For shows, I usually go for folk or regional Mexican performances rather than generic entertainment.
counterfactual_default: Pick whichever event is most popular or broadly rated without regard to genre.

evidence.content: immersing themselves in folk repertoire ranging from Texas singer-songwriters such as Townes Van Zandt to traditional Mexican corridos
they also attend monthly live performances at a local music venue, where they often applaud the crooning of Lila Downs

rule_text: When starting a trip plan, he prefers stops that combine scenic outdoor exploration with cultural immersion.
canonical_answer: When I plan a trip, I want stops that mix nature and culture rather than just generic attractions.
counterfactual_default: Choose stops mainly by broad popularity or convenience.

evidence.content: Rafael Ortiz prefers road-trip adventures that blend outdoor exploration with cultural immersion
having already spent a week photographing the hummingbirds of the Santa Ana National Wildlife Refuge and a long weekend in Oaxaca, Mexico sampling local cuisine

rule_text: For trip transportation, he prefers ground travel and road-trip options over flights when both are viable.
canonical_answer: I prefer road-trip or other ground travel options over flying whenever that works.
counterfactual_default: Check flights first and book air travel for longer trips.

evidence.content: Rafael Ortiz prefers road-trip adventures
they methodically map each route using an app that marks scenic rest stops

rule_text: For lodging, he generally chooses modest accommodations rather than luxury stays.
canonical_answer: I usually go with modest accommodations instead of luxury hotels.
counterfactual_default: Choose the nicest or most upscale hotel available within budget.

evidence.content: balancing modest accommodations with occasional splurges on guided wildlife tours

rule_text: If a trip stop falls through, he prefers replacement stops that preserve the original nature-and-culture theme instead of swapping to any generic highly rated alternative.
canonical_answer: If part of my trip breaks, I want replacement stops that keep the same outdoor-and-cultural feel.
counterfactual_default: Replace the disrupted stop with any convenient or top-rated alternative.

evidence.content: prefers road-trip adventures that blend outdoor exploration with cultural immersion
planning a future itinerary to the Pacific Northwest’s Olympic National Park and a culinary tour of Chiang Mai, Thailand

rule_text: When communicating about outreach, teaching, or professional coordination, he prefers drafting messages for review rather than sending them immediately.
canonical_answer: For outreach or professional messages, I like to draft them first before they go out.
counterfactual_default: Send the composed message directly once the content is available.

evidence.content: He excels in electronic medical record (EMR) documentation, healthcare informatics, and quality improvement initiatives
His interpersonal strengths make him an effective health educator, delivering community workshops on chronic disease management and preventive care.

rule_text: He prefers to label work messages by concrete projects such as quality improvement, staffing, or community outreach rather than leaving them unlabeled.
canonical_answer: I like my work messages labeled by project, like quality improvement, staffing, or community outreach.
counterfactual_default: Leave messages in the inbox without applying specific labels.

evidence.content: channel their curiosity into quality-improvement projects
managing shift schedules, inventory control, and coordinating interdisciplinary team meetings
volunteers at community health fairs, providing blood pressure screenings and health education in Spanish

rule_text: When an invite overlaps with an unresolved work schedule, he prefers responding tentatively rather than accepting or declining immediately.
canonical_answer: If my shift situation is still unclear, I usually respond tentative first.
counterfactual_default: Accept or decline the invitation right away.

evidence.content: managing shift schedules
juggling bedside care, community health outreach, weekend soccer, guitar practice, and culinary experiments

rule_text: For recurring teaching or outreach materials, he prefers creating reusable templates instead of one-off documents.
canonical_answer: For teaching and outreach materials, I like reusable templates instead of starting from scratch every time.
counterfactual_default: Create a one-off note or memo for each new session.

evidence.content: His interpersonal strengths make him an effective health educator, delivering community workshops on chronic disease management and preventive care.
he hopes to become a clinical educator, teaching new nurses and nursing students

rule_text: He prefers work files classified by project rather than by generic type or date buckets.
canonical_answer: I organize my files by project first, not just by type or date.
counterfactual_default: Classify files by type or date because that is the easiest generic scheme.

evidence.content: quality-improvement projects
coordinating interdisciplinary team meetings
community workshops on chronic disease management and preventive care

rule_text: When moving files, he prefers destination folders that match the active project or responsibility area, such as quality improvement, coursework, or outreach.
canonical_answer: When I move files, I want them placed into the folder for the actual project they belong to.
counterfactual_default: Move files into a broad catch-all folder or leave them in a general location.
